description: A test to measure levels of components in the blood.
precautions: Fast for 8–12 hours before certain blood tests.
Take medications as prescribed unless instructed otherwise.

description: Magnetic Resonance Imaging to visualize internal structures.
precautions: Remove all metal objects before scan.
Inform technician if you have implants or pacemakers.
Do not eat if sedation is required.

description: Imaging technique to visualize bones and internal organs.
Imaging technique using sound waves to view internal organs.
precautions: Drink water before abdominal ultrasound if required.
